emails.subject: Meter 1459, 6/00
emails.body: Meter 1459, 6/00 Daren I need a deal set up for meter 1459 for June '00. It flowed 34/day 6/1-6/6. The last deal number used was 77352 for ENA. Please let me know when this is set up. Thanks, Aimee
